readings.Aries: Leadership is not volume. Today, the quieter approach covers more ground. Something is about to become obvious.
readings.Taurus: Your relationship with pleasure is complicated in a way that has nothing to do with pleasure. This is a better week for listening than speaking.
readings.Gemini: You can do two things at once. This particular thing requires one. One conversation today matters more than the rest combined.
readings.Cancer: Your history is rich and present in everything you do. It is also, in some places, instructing you incorrectly. This situation responds well to direct engagement.
readings.Leo: Your creativity needs an outlet or it will find one you didn't choose. Give it space. This situation responds well to direct engagement.
readings.Virgo: Something you noticed and catalogued weeks ago is relevant now. Your records are good. Sleep on it before committing.
readings.Libra: Your desire for fairness is genuine. In this situation, fairness and kindness are not the same thing. This is a better week for listening than speaking.
readings.Scorpio: The depth you offer is rarely offered back. That is worth knowing clearly, not dramatically. Simpler is correct here.
readings.Sagittarius: The fire in you is generative and occasionally destructive. Today, mind the surroundings. The energy available today is better used gently.
readings.Capricorn: Something you've built together with someone else is worth tending to. Not as a project. As a relationship. Sleep on it before committing.
readings.Aquarius: Your need for intellectual stimulation is as real as any physical need. Feed it properly today. The week ahead rewards preparation you can still do today.
readings.Pisces: Your relationship with reality is flexible by nature. Today, anchor to something concrete. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: You work well when one agrees to be the foundation and the other agrees to be the spark. Agreement is the hard part.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: The support here is genuine and sometimes suffocating. The line between them is worth watching.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: The security you build together is real. Real security sometimes disguises the need for something more.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: The stability and the depth work well together — until they work too well and nobody grows.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: You build things that last. The slower the construction, the less you talk about what might be missing.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: You bring out ambition in each other. Whose ambition you're actually serving is a fair question.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you is always explaining why it should move. One of you is quietly proving why it works as it is.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: You feel each other before you know each other. Whether that's intimacy or projection is worth examining.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The mismatch in how you process things is a feature in good times and a fault line in bad ones.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: This tends to become quietly necessary to both people before either admits it.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Your natural speeds are different. Finding the pace that doesn't frustrate either of you is the whole project.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: You're rarely bored together. Occasionally you're frustrated by the inability to just be still.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you explains. One of you feels. At some point the explaining stops helping.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: Something about this combination feels irresistible to both of you. That irresistibility is worth examining.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: The bond forms quietly and completely. What you've bonded over — desire, or need — is worth knowing.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: The foundation feels natural because it is. What gets built on top of it requires more deliberate attention.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: Nobody outside this pairing fully understands what happens inside it. That's exactly how you want it.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: The competition is never stated and never absent. You perform for each other even when you don't mean to.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: In theory you stabilise each other. In practice, one of you always feels slightly extinguished.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional and the intellectual are in conversation here. When it works, it's singular. When it doesn't, it's lonely.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: The emotional fluency here is extraordinary. The risk is drowning in it before finding solid ground.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
